svg.title: 3-Tier Architecture: Book Buy & Sell Platform
svg.desc: Three-tier architecture diagram showing presentation, application, and data layers for a book marketplace with in-app coin purchasing

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the web app frontend')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the mobile app')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the admin panel')
sendPrompt('Tell me about API gateway patterns')
g.text: API Gateway — Auth, Rate Limiting, Routing

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the book listing service')
sendPrompt('How does the coin wallet system work?')
sendPrompt('What notifications does the platform send?')
sendPrompt('What data is stored in PostgreSQL?')
sendPrompt('What files are stored in S3?')
sendPrompt('How does Stripe integration work for coin purchases?')
